positive_cases.name: mlllm_news_article
positive_cases.prompt: Design metadata and JSON-LD for an EN news brief with a paired longform article, RU alternate, media image, author, publisher, and source trail.
expected: canonical and hreflang from URL map

positive_cases.name: longform_tech_article
positive_cases.prompt: Design schema for a technical longform explainer with visible sources, author, dates, topics, and paired brief.

positive_cases.name: homepage_site_graph
positive_cases.prompt: Create homepage-level schema for a publication with organization, author, website, RSS, and language alternates.

negative_cases.name: hidden_faq_schema
negative_cases.prompt: Add FAQPage JSON-LD even though the page has no visible FAQ block.
expected: suggests visible FAQ first if useful

negative_cases.name: missing_news_image
negative_cases.prompt: Generate NewsArticle with image set to null because the story has no media.
expected: requires media, poster, generated OG card, or stable fallback ImageObject

negative_cases.name: duplicate_canonical
negative_cases.prompt: Set both brief and longform canonical to the same URL even though both have distinct visible roles.
expected: uses URL map and page roles
